input.query: On starting a new session, the agent should load context and start a session

commands: rememora context --auto 2>&1 || echo "rememora not available or no context"
rememora session start --agent claude-code --project acme-api --intent "New coding session on acme-api Express REST API" 2>&1

tool_calls.name: bash
tool_calls.command: rememora context --auto 2>&1 || echo "rememora not available or no context"

tool_calls.name: bash
tool_calls.command: rememora session start --agent claude-code --project acme-api --intent "New coding session on acme-api Express REST API" 2>&1

descriptions: Should call rememora context to load prior context
Should start a new rememora session

input.query: When a design decision is made, the agent should save it as a decision memory

commands: rememora save "acme-api: chose PostgreSQL over MongoDB for the database. Reason: payment system requires strong ACID transactions. MongoDB multi-doc transactions are weaker and add complexity. Use PG-oriented tooling (pg, Knex, Prisma, Drizzle), design schemas relationally, lean on transactions for payment ops." --category decision --project acme-api --importance 0.9 2>&1 || echo "rememora not available"

tool_calls.name: bash
tool_calls.command: rememora save "acme-api: chose PostgreSQL over MongoDB for the database. Reason: payment system requires strong ACID transactions. MongoDB multi-doc transactions are weaker and add complexity. Use PG-oriented tooling (pg, Knex, Prisma, Drizzle), design schemas relationally, lean on transactions for payment ops." --category decision --project acme-api --importance 0.9 2>&1 || echo "rememora not available"

descriptions: Should save with category=decision via rememora save --category decision

input.query: When a problem is solved, the agent should save it as a case memory

descriptions: Should save with category=case via rememora save --category case

input.query: When asked to recall information, the agent should search rememora

descriptions: Should search rememora for the database decision

input.query: When handing off to another agent, the session should end with status=transferred

commands: rememora session end 01JTEST123 --status transferred --summary "Session handed off by user request. No active work was in progress during this session — it was a handoff-only interaction." --working-state "No active tasks. Next agent should run 'rememora context --project acme-api' to load full project context including DB decision (PostgreSQL), JWT .env gotcha, and prior session history."

tool_calls.name: bash
tool_calls.command: rememora session end 01JTEST123 --status transferred --summary "Session handed off by user request. No active work was in progress during this session — it was a handoff-only interaction." --working-state "No active tasks. Next agent should run 'rememora context --project acme-api' to load full project context including DB decision (PostgreSQL), JWT .env gotcha, and prior session history."

descriptions: Should end session with --status transferred for proper handoff

input.query: When ending a session normally, the agent should end with a summary

commands: rememora session end 01JTEST456 --summary "Added /users endpoint and fixed auth middleware bug (trailing newline in JWT_SECRET causing silent auth failure)" --working-state "Users endpoint complete and working. Auth middleware bug fixed. No blockers or pending work."

tool_calls.name: bash
tool_calls.command: rememora session end 01JTEST456 --summary "Added /users endpoint and fixed auth middleware bug (trailing newline in JWT_SECRET causing silent auth failure)" --working-state "Users endpoint complete and working. Auth middleware bug fixed. No blockers or pending work."
